## Context

What real repository quality problem are we solving?

## Task

Describe the concrete task.

## Why It Matters

Explain how this improves trust, maintainability, or collaboration.

## Suggested Output

- [ ] Code change
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Workflow cleanup
- [ ] Repository metadata

## Verification

How will we know this is done?
